landing.badge: Ko te tino kaihanga kōpaki mo nga kaihanga
landing.subtitle: Ko nga mea katoa e hiahia ana koe ki te whakaatu i o pukenga, kaupapa, me to wheako.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Ka whakaratohia e matou nga taputapu katoa e hiahia ana koe ki te tu atu i te mano me te tuku i to mahi moemoea.
landing.feature1Desc: Maamaa te whakarite i o waahanga, kaupapa, me o pukenga me to maatau ētita ataata.
landing.feature2Desc: Whiriwhiria mai i nga tauira tauira i hangaia e te hunga ngaio, hanga ranei i to ake ahua ahurei.
landing.feature3Desc: Aroturuki i o manuhiri, tirohia ko wai nga kaupapa e aro nui ana, me etahi atu.

deleteAccount.title: Muku Pūkete
deleteAccount.successMessage: Kua tukuna he īmēra whakaū mo te mukunga pūkete.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: I rahua te tuku īmēra whakaū.
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: Ka whiwhi koe i tetahi imeera hei whakaū i te mukunga o te kaute.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Mena ka whakamanahia, ka mukua nga raraunga katoa (pukapuka, kaupapa, tatauranga) ka kore e taea te whakaora.

privacy.title: Kaupapahere Tūmataiti
privacy.intro: Ko tenei Kaupapahere Whaiaro e whakamarama ana me pehea te kohikohi, te whakamahi, me te tiaki a DevFolio i o korero whaiaro ina whakamahi ana i a maatau ratonga.
privacy.section1Title: 1. Nga korero ka kohia e matou
privacy.section1Content: Ka kohia e matou nga korero ka tukuna tika e koe i te wa e hanga ana i tetahi kaute, te hanga putea, me te whakapiri atu ki a maatau tautoko.
privacy.section2Content: Ka whakamahia o korero ki te whakahaere, ki te pupuri, ki te whakarato i nga ahuatanga o a maatau ratonga, me te korero ki a koe mo to putea, ratonga ranei.
privacy.section3Content: Ka whakatinanahia e matou nga tikanga haumaru tika hei tiaki i o korero mai i te urunga kore mana, te whakaatu, te whakangaro ranei.

confirmDeleteAccount.missingToken: Kaore i kitea te tohu tohu.

confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Tatari koa, kei te tukatuka matou i to tono.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: Kua mukua katoa o raraunga. Ka tukuna ano koe...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Kua tukuna he waehere OTP ki to imeera.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Kua rehitatia tenei imeera ma tetahi tuatoru.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Kua manatoko pai te waehere OTP.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Kua pau te waehere OTP. Tonoa he waehere hou.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Kua tukuna he waehere OTP hou ki to imeera.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: I rahua te tuku ano i te waehere OTP. Me ngana ano.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: I angitu te tautuhi i te kupuhipa. Tena koa takiuru me to kupuhipa hou.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: I rahua te tautuhi i te kupuhipa.
forgotPassword.title: Wareware Kupuhipa
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email address registered on your account. Ka tukuna he waehere OTP hei tautuhi i te kupuhipa.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Enter the 6 digit code that has been sent to your email to confirm your identity.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Create a new, strong password to secure your account.

verifyEmail.resendError: I rahua te tuku ano i te imeera whakaū. Me ngana ano.
verifyEmail.checkingStatus: Kei te taki i te mana manatoko...
verifyEmail.title: Tirohia To Īmēra
verifyEmail.description: Kua tukuna e matou he īmēra whakaū ki tō wāhitau īmēra. Whakatuwheratia te imeera ka paato i te paatene <1>"Whakaū Kaute"</1> hei whakahohe i to putea.
verifyEmail.step1: Whakatuwherahia to tono imeera (Gmail, Yahoo, aha atu)
verifyEmail.step2: Rapua he imeera mai i DevFolio me te kaupapa "Whakahohenga Pūkete"
verifyEmail.step3: Patohia te paatene "Whakapumau Pūkete" i te imeera
verifyEmail.step4: Ka tukuna koe ki te wharangi takiuru ki te whakauru
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Kua tukuna ano te imeera manatoko!
verifyEmail.footerNote: Kaore i whiwhi i te imeera? Tirohia te <1>Spam</1> ranei <2>Junk</2> kōpaki i roto i to īmēra. He mana te hono manatoko mo <3>24 haora</3>.
